name: Longest Happy Prefix
description: A string is called a happy prefix if it is a non-empty prefix which is also a suffix (excluding itself). Given a string s, return the longest happy prefix of s. Return an empty string if no such prefix exists. This is directly related to the KMP failure function / LPS array.
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 10^5. s contains only lowercase English letters.

performance.stress_intent: exercise border computation on max-length border-heavy strings that reject repeated whole-prefix comparisons locally
